product.name: ChrisDowa Blackout Roller Shades for Windows, Striped Pattern Cordless Pull Down Door Blinds with Privacy, Thermal Insulated Window Shades for Living Room, Home and Office. Black, 20" W x 72" H
features: 【Excellent Striped Material】: Made of high quality 100% blackout fabric with striped pattern, feeling soft and smooth. Our shade blind features a clean & modern look equipped with aluminum bottom rod, made of durable fabric and sturdy hanging system.Easy to install.

【Safety Cordless Design】: The best safety solution for your children and pets. Our spring-loaded mechanism has passed 5,000 times usual lifting or pulling down tests for each shade. To open the roller blind, pull it at whatever position you want. To shut the roller blind, you can gently pull the buckle and the roller blind would automatically close.

【Multiple Function and Scenario】：Our office roller shade blocks out most sunlight and UV rays. reduce room heat and cold loss through window during winter and summer, helping cut your energy bills. It also works well in noise reducing and privacy protection. Great for bedroom, living room, bathroom, kitchen, French door and office.

【Measurement】: For inside mount, window frame should have at least 2” depth, and blackout roller shades will have a tiny light gap on each side. 【IMPORTANT】:Our fabric size is 0.6 inch smaller than the size you select. To avoid light gap, consider the outside mount. For outside mount, shade should be 4” - 6” wider than window frame, shade length should be at least 2” longer than the window length for better coverage.

【Easy Installation & Care】: Our door shade contains an accessory kit including metal bracket, screws and install instruction for convenience. Clean with damp cloth, Low Iron. If accessories are missing or broken, please message us and we will resend the accessories ASAP.
